product_overview: Bardo is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) backend that exposes a set of authenticated endpoints for AI agents and players to interact with a file-backed, multi-tenant RPG world stored as markdown files with YAML frontmatter.
core_goals: Provide a stable MCP API surface for creating and managing ephemeral MCP sessions and streaming session events.
Expose tools for initializing and managing campaign workspaces and markdown-backed campaign state (read, upsert, get, set).
Enforce multi-tenant isolation using API keys mapped to campaign directories, with safe path handling to prevent traversal.
Keep a minimal, file-based persistence model compatible with Bun runtime and simple deployment, with clear health and auth introspection.

features.name: Health Check
features.description: Unauthenticated endpoint that reports server health, whether auth is required, and the number of configured API keys.
user_flows: GET /health -> Receive 200 with JSON { status: "ok", authRequired: boolean, configuredApiKeys: number }
GET /health -> Receive 500 when internal configuration parsing fails (e.g., malformed BARDO_API_KEYS_JSON)

features.name: MCP Session Management
features.description: Create, use (SSE), and close MCP sessions. Sessions are UUIDs stored in-memory and scoped to the API key/campaign.
user_flows: POST /mcp with JSON-RPC request body (create session) and valid x-api-key header -> Receive 200 with JSON-RPC response and mcp-session-id response header -> GET /mcp with mcp-session-id header and same x-api-key -> Receive 200 SSE stream of session events -> DELETE /mcp with mcp-session-id header and same x-api-key -> Receive 200 Session closed
GET /mcp without mcp-session-id header -> Receive 400 Missing mcp-session-id header
GET /mcp with mcp-session-id header for non-existent session and valid x-api-key -> Receive 404 Session not found
POST /mcp with no API key when auth is required -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Authentication
features.description: API-key based authentication with campaign isolation: keys configured via BARDO_API_KEYS_JSON, resolved from x-api-key header, Authorization: Bearer, or ?apiKey query param; optional default/local dev key support; server can run in no-auth mode if env not set.
user_flows: POST /mcp with x-api-key header set to a configured key -> Receive 200 with JSON-RPC response (request routed to campaign directory mapped to that key)
POST /mcp with Authorization: Bearer <key> header set to a configured key -> Receive 200 with JSON-RPC response
POST /mcp?apiKey=<configured-key> without auth headers -> Receive 200 with JSON-RPC response
POST /mcp without any API key when BARDO_API_KEYS_JSON is set -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
POST /mcp without API key when BARDO_API_KEYS_JSON is not set -> Receive 200 (server in no-auth mode, request accepted)

features.name: MCP Tool - init
features.description: Initialize the bardo workspace directory tree (rules, party, entities, items, world, quests, state) under the campaign root. Idempotent.
user_flows: POST /mcp with JSON-RPC body { method: "tools/call", params: { tool: "init" } } and valid x-api-key header -> Receive 200 with status report of directories created/verified
POST /mcp with JSON-RPC body { method: "tools/call", params: { tool: "init" } } and invalid x-api-key -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
POST /mcp with JSON-RPC body missing the tool field and valid x-api-key -> Receive 400 Malformed JSON-RPC request (missing tool)

features.name: MCP Tool - markdown_read
features.description: Read a markdown file from the campaign workspace and return parsed YAML frontmatter and body. Path validation prevents directory traversal.
user_flows: POST /mcp with JSON-RPC body { method: "tools/call", params: { tool: "markdown_read", args: { path: "world/locations/town.md" } } } and valid x-api-key -> Receive 200 with parsed frontmatter and body content

POST /mcp with JSON-RPC body { method: "tools/call", params: { tool: "markdown_read", args: { path: "../etc/passwd" } } } and valid x-api-key -> Receive 400 Path validation error (directory traversal prevented)
POST /mcp with JSON-RPC body { method: "tools/call", params: { tool: "markdown_read", args: { path: "world/locations/missing.md" } } } and valid x-api-key -> Receive 404 File not found

features.name: MCP Tool - markdown_upsert
features.description: Create or update a markdown file under the campaign workspace. Supports merge strategies (replace, append, prepend) and preserves frontmatter fields like title and description.
user_flows: POST /mcp with JSON-RPC body { method: "tools/call", params: { tool: "markdown_upsert", args: { path: "world/locations/inn.md", title: "The Drunk Dragon", content: "...", mergeStrategy: "replace" } } } and valid x-api-key -> Receive 200 with final frontmatter and content written

POST /mcp with JSON-RPC body { method: "tools/call", params: { tool: "markdown_upsert", args: { path: "world/locations/inn.md" } } } and valid x-api-key -> Receive 400 Missing required fields (e.g., content or mergeStrategy when required by the call)

POST /mcp with JSON-RPC body { method: "tools/call", params: { tool: "markdown_upsert", args: { path: "world/locations/inn.md", mergeStrategy: "invalid" } } } and valid x-api-key -> Receive 400 Invalid mergeStrategy

features.name: MCP Tool - player_action
features.description: Primary gameplay tool: process natural-language player actions, auto-advance world time, create locations/NPCs as needed, and update campaign state and action history.
user_flows: POST /mcp with JSON-RPC body { method: "tools/call", params: { tool: "player_action", args: { action: "Travel to the old mill" } } } and valid x-api-key -> Receive 200 with gameplay event including time advancement, location changes, and created entities
POST /mcp with JSON-RPC body { method: "tools/call", params: { tool: "player_action", args: { action: "" } } } and valid x-api-key -> Receive 400 Validation error: action must be 1-1000 characters
POST /mcp with JSON-RPC body { method: "tools/call", params: { tool: "player_action", args: { action: "Explore" } } } and invalid x-api-key -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: MCP Tool - state_get
features.description: Read campaign state stored as JSON in a markdown file (default state/current.md) and return parsed frontmatter and a structured state object.
user_flows: POST /mcp with JSON-RPC body { method: "tools/call", params: { tool: "state_get", args: { path: "state/current.md" } } } and valid x-api-key -> Receive 200 with parsed frontmatter and state object
POST /mcp with JSON-RPC body { method: "tools/call", params: { tool: "state_get", args: { path: "state/missing.md" } } } and valid x-api-key -> Receive 404 State file not found

POST /mcp with JSON-RPC body { method: "tools/call", params: { tool: "state_get" } } and valid x-api-key -> Receive 200 with parsed frontmatter and state object (uses default path state/current.md if no path provided)

features.name: MCP Tool - state_set
features.description: Write campaign state JSON into a markdown file with frontmatter metadata; state is pretty-printed and persisted under the campaign workspace.
user_flows: POST /mcp with JSON-RPC body { method: "tools/call", params: { tool: "state_set", args: { path: "state/current.md", state: { day: 3 }, title: "Current State" } } } and valid x-api-key -> Receive 200 confirmation with final state written

POST /mcp with JSON-RPC body { method: "tools/call", params: { tool: "state_set", args: { path: "state/current.md", state: "not-an-object" } } } and valid x-api-key -> Receive 400 Validation error: state must be an object
POST /mcp with JSON-RPC body { method: "tools/call", params: { tool: "state_set", args: { path: "state/current.md", state: { day: 3 } } } } and invalid x-api-key -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Health Check
features.description: Returns server health status including auth configuration

endpoints.description: Returns server health status, auth requirement, and configured API key count

features.name: MCP Session Management
features.description: Create, use, and close MCP sessions for communication with AI agents

endpoints.description: Create a new MCP session or send a request to an existing session
Retrieve data from an existing MCP session (SSE stream)

features.name: Authentication
features.description: API key based authentication with multi-tenant campaign isolation

features.name: MCP Tool - init
features.description: Initialize bardo workspace directory structure under authorized campaign root

endpoints.description: MCP tool call - init - creates bardo directory tree (rules, party, entities, items, world, quests, state)

request_schema.body: JSON-RPC call with method "tools/call", tool name "init", no arguments

features.name: MCP Tool - markdown_read
features.description: Read a markdown file under bardo workspace, parsing frontmatter and body

endpoints.description: MCP tool call - markdown_read - reads and parses markdown files

request_schema.body: JSON-RPC call with tool name "markdown_read", args: { path: string }

features.name: MCP Tool - markdown_upsert
features.description: Create or update a markdown file with frontmatter and content merge strategies

endpoints.description: MCP tool call - markdown_upsert - creates or updates markdown files

request_schema.body: JSON-RPC call with tool name "markdown_upsert", args: { path: string, title?: string, description?: string, content?: string, mergeStrategy?: "replace"|"append"|"prepend" }

features.name: MCP Tool - player_action
features.description: Primary gameplay tool that processes natural language player actions, advances world time, creates locations/NPCs, and updates state

endpoints.description: MCP tool call - player_action - processes player actions with auto time advancement and entity creation

request_schema.body: JSON-RPC call with tool name "player_action", args: { action: string (1-1000 chars) }

response_schema.200: Gameplay event including time advancement, location changes, created entities

features.name: MCP Tool - state_get
features.description: Read campaign state from a markdown file and parse JSON body

endpoints.description: MCP tool call - state_get - reads and parses state JSON from markdown

request_schema.body: JSON-RPC call with tool name "state_get", args: { path?: string }

features.name: MCP Tool - state_set
features.description: Write campaign state as JSON in a markdown file with frontmatter metadata

endpoints.description: MCP tool call - state_set - writes state JSON to markdown file

request_schema.body: JSON-RPC call with tool name "state_set", args: { path?: string, state: object, title?: string, description?: string }

response_schema.200: Confirmation of write with final state

known_limitations.issue: Sessions stored in-memory only, lost on server restart
known_limitations.impact: All active MCP sessions are lost when server restarts

known_limitations.issue: No rate limiting on API endpoints
known_limitations.impact: Server could be overwhelmed by excessive requests

known_limitations.issue: File-based storage has no concurrency control
known_limitations.impact: Concurrent writes to same file could cause data loss
